languages.text: "Тлетворная, кощунственная ворожба, подменяющая собой чистый ток Движущей Силы". {n}Гневные сполохи разрядов пробегают по бороде Эоганна, и вы слышите металлический стон, идущий отовсюду. Словно сами своды мануфакторума вторят манипулусу воем, исполненным ярости и боли.{/n}

"Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Тлетворная, кощунственная ворожба, подменяющая собой чистый ток Движущей Силы". {n}Гневные сполохи разрядов пробегают по бороде Эоганна, и вы слышите металлический стон, идущий отовсюду. Словно сами своды мануфакторума вторят манипулусу воем, исполненным ярости и боли.{/n}

As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

languages.text: «Hechicería maligna y blasfema que suplanta la corriente pura de la Fuerza Motriz». {n}Unas chispas furiosas de estática estallan en la barba de Eogunn y oyes chirridos metálicos en todas las direcciones. Es como si los propios arcos del manufactorum se hicieran eco del manipulus con un aullido de furia y angustia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hechicería maligna y blasfema que suplanta la corriente pura de la Fuerza Motriz». {n}Unas chispas furiosas de estática estallan en la barba de Eogunn y oyes chirridos metálicos en todas las direcciones. Es como si los propios arcos del manufactorum se hicieran eco del manipulus con un aullido de furia y angustia.{/n}

languages.text: “恶毒而亵渎的巫术，竟敢取代源力的纯净洪流。”{n}愤怒的静电火花在伊奥贡的胡须间噼啪炸裂，与此同时，你听到四面八方都传来金属的呻吟。仿佛连制造工厂的拱顶都在回应操纵者的怒火，一同发出充满愤怒与悲怆的哀鸣。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “恶毒而亵渎的巫术，竟敢取代源力的纯净洪流。”{n}愤怒的静电火花在伊奥贡的胡须间噼啪炸裂，与此同时，你听到四面八方都传来金属的呻吟。仿佛连制造工厂的拱顶都在回应操纵者的怒火，一同发出充满愤怒与悲怆的哀鸣。{/n}

languages.text: "Bösartige, blasphemische Hexerei verdrängt den reinen Kern der Antriebskraft." {n}Elektrostatische Funken tanzen wütend über Eogunns Bart und du hörst von allen Seiten ein metallisches Stöhnen widerhallen. Als würden die Bögen des Manufactorums selbst mit dem Manipulus harmonieren, der ein Wehklagen voller Zorn und Schmerz anstimmt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bösartige, blasphemische Hexerei verdrängt den reinen Kern der Antriebskraft." {n}Elektrostatische Funken tanzen wütend über Eogunns Bart und du hörst von allen Seiten ein metallisches Stöhnen widerhallen. Als würden die Bögen des Manufactorums selbst mit dem Manipulus harmonieren, der ein Wehklagen voller Zorn und Schmerz anstimmt.{/n}

languages.text: « Une sorcellerie malfaisante et blasphématoire qui supplante le courant pur de la Force Motrice. » {n}Des étincelles d'électricité statique crépitent rageusement dans la barbe d'Eogunn, et vous entendez un grincement métallique résonner tout autour de vous, comme si les arches du manufactorum se joignaient au manipulus indigné, poussant un hurlement empreint de fureur et de crainte.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Une sorcellerie malfaisante et blasphématoire qui supplante le courant pur de la Force Motrice. » {n}Des étincelles d'électricité statique crépitent rageusement dans la barbe d'Eogunn, et vous entendez un grincement métallique résonner tout autour de vous, comme si les arches du manufactorum se joignaient au manipulus indigné, poussant un hurlement empreint de fureur et de crainte.{/n}

languages.text: "Devinim Gücü'nün saf akımının yerini alan kötücül, kâfirce bir sahirlik." {n}Eogunn'un sakalında öfkeli statik kıvılcımlar çakıyor. Her yerden yankılanan metalik bir inilti duyuyorsun. Sanki manufaktorumun kemerleri Manipülus'a eşlik ediyor, öfke ve acı dolu bir feryat koparıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Devinim Gücü'nün saf akımının yerini alan kötücül, kâfirce bir sahirlik." {n}Eogunn'un sakalında öfkeli statik kıvılcımlar çakıyor. Her yerden yankılanan metalik bir inilti duyuyorsun. Sanki manufaktorumun kemerleri Manipülus'a eşlik ediyor, öfke ve acı dolu bir feryat koparıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「悪意に満ちた、神への冒涜である魔術が、動機力の純粋な流れを奪い去る」{n}エオグンの髭に静電気が飛び散り、金属製の唸り声がどこからともなく響く。まるで製造所そのものがマニピュラスと共鳴し、怒りと苦痛に満ちた悲鳴を上げるかのようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}
